title: Dump parameter and localparam in vcd
body:
Incisive produces:

```
$scope module mymodule $end
$var parameter 32 !    BITS  $end
...

$dumpvars
b10 !
...

[no further changes]
```

for both `parameter BITS = 2` and `localparam BITS = 2` and this seems to be specified by the Verilog 2005 standard accordingly.
code_blocks:
$scope module mymodule $end
$var parameter 32 !    BITS  $end
...

$dumpvars
b10 !
...

[no further changes]
